title: Cough follow-up in GP
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Specifies cough duration, quality, timing, risk factors, and associated-symptom history domains.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Cough – 46
source.population: People presenting with cough; age limits are not stated in the applicability section.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth cough documentation; only partial for a general in-person workflow and for chronic-cough investigation pathways.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies cough duration, quality, timing, risk factors, and associated-symptom history domains.

assessment.text: Specifies cough duration, quality, timing, risk factors, and associated-symptom history domains.
assessment.rationale: The exact DHA history section supports cough duration, quality, timing, triggers, risk factors, associated symptoms, and interval change without assigning a respiratory diagnosis.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Cough – 46

source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies cough duration, quality, timing, risk factors, and associated-symptom history domains.

assessment.text: Lists cough features that require serious-condition assessment or face-to-face escalation.
assessment.rationale: The exact red-flag section supports clinician-assessed severe, respiratory, systemic, bleeding, neurological, or deterioration concerns and available examination without asserting a negative.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Cough – 46
source.population: People presenting with cough; age limits are not stated in the applicability section.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth cough documentation; only partial for a general in-person workflow and for chronic-cough investigation pathways.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists cough features that require serious-condition assessment or face-to-face escalation.

assessment.text: Supports clinician-selected blood tests, chest radiography, peak-flow diary, pulmonary function testing, sputum testing, ECG, and specialist-led advanced imaging.
assessment.rationale: The exact investigation section supports recording already reviewed blood, chest radiograph, lung-function, sputum, ECG, or advanced-imaging context without ordering tests.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Cough – 46
source.population: People presenting with cough; age limits are not stated in the applicability section.

source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth cough documentation; only partial for a general in-person workflow and for chronic-cough investigation pathways.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports clinician-selected blood tests, chest radiography, peak-flow diary, pulmonary function testing, sputum testing, ECG, and specialist-led advanced imaging.

assessment.text: Supports clinician-led emergency, family-medicine, and pulmonary referral according to the documented cough context.
assessment.rationale: The exact referral section supports clinician-entered safety net, referral status, questions, and follow-up without assigning urgency automatically.
